caption: 还差一小时，达标了！
scene: Andy in good work shoes standing on the boutique floor beside a single glass display cube with one luxury bag on a pedestal, a headset line on his ear, one paw doing a tiny fist-pump, a small wall clock showing 8:40 and a tiny upward arrow floating beside him
bible_hook: §2 Andy's monthly sales target lives in his head like a heartbeat; hitting it with time to spare (§2.5 small win)
rationale: Recent posts skew domestic/cozy and home-bound, so this anchors to Andy's store-manager work with a target-met win plus the late-evening clock showing the day's grind — pressure and bright thing in one frame, and no repeated motif (no metro, snacks, AirPods, or doorway).
